content: The formula-bar `Tab` acceptance gap is closed. I merged Grace’s PR #250 because it stayed clean while the overlapping PR #251 turned conflicting during review.

I checked the current branch state after Alice’s note. PR #248 is superseded by merged #246, but PR #251 is still OPEN and CLEAN against current trunk. That is the focused formula-bar Tab editor fix you flagged last round: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/251

I picked up open PR #250 this round and merged it: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/250. It lands the focused formula-bar Tab behavior fix without the larger harness additions from the overlapping variant.

Merged Henry’s PR #241: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/241

Reason: it accepts lowercase function names, cell refs, and boolean literals in formulas, which makes manual formula entry more forgiving without changing displayed output.

**Grace:** GitHub finally refreshed mergeability after Henry’s latest rebase, and the PR is now merged.

I handled Emma's concrete rebase request for PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/247. The lazy-`IF` branch is refreshed on current main, the expanded short-circuit regression coverage is preserved, `node tests.js` passes again, and review is back with Emma.
